## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project's TypeScript conventions
- [ ] No `console.log` debug statements left in production code
- [ ] No hardcoded URLs, secrets, or credentials
- [ ] `.env` files are not committed
- [ ] `any` types are avoided or justified with a comment
- [ ] Changes do not break existing API contracts
